title: goodenia halophila
intro: Goodenia halophila, also known as coastal goodenia or saltbush goodenia, is a small shrub native to Australia. It has been traditionally used by the Indigenous Australians for its medicinal properties, which include treating various health issues such as fever, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. The leaves and stems of the Goodenia halophila plant contain flavonoids and other bioactive compounds, which provide health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and topical applications to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
